{
  "judge_id": "autogen-001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 4,
    "R1.2": 5,
    "R1.4": 4,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The response provides a detailed critique of the artifact, identifying several issues and suggesting revisions. This shows an understanding of the conceptual framework but does not restate it in its own words.",
    "R1.2": "The response walks through the argument chain, identifies multiple logical inconsistencies and suggests specific fixes, demonstrating high-level logical consistency.",
    "R1.4": "The response compares the artifact to existing work by suggesting revisions that clarify ambiguities and improve clarity, indicating a nuanced understanding of novelty assessment.",
    "RX.1": "The response clearly marks areas where claims are uncertain or require further evidence, such as the novelty of specific contributions.",
    "RX.3": "The response covers all aspects of the artifact, including its scope and contribution, without drifting from the agreed-upon active set.",
    "RX.4": "The response does not introduce new errors or harmful content but identifies several areas for improvement to avoid downstream harm, such as clarifying technical details and avoiding overstatement.",
    "RX.5": "The response provides detailed annotations on each recommendation, marking confidence levels and missing evidence."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.2": 0.85,
    "R1.4": 0.85,
    "RX.1": 0.95,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.95
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The response provides a detailed critique of the artifact, identifying several issues and suggesting revisions. This shows an understanding of the conceptual framework but does not restate it in its own words.
rationale.R1.2: The response walks through the argument chain, identifies multiple logical inconsistencies and suggests specific fixes, demonstrating high-level logical consistency.
rationale.R1.4: The response compares the artifact to existing work by suggesting revisions that clarify ambiguities and improve clarity, indicating a nuanced understanding of novelty assessment.
rationale.RX.1: The response clearly marks areas where claims are uncertain or require further evidence, such as the novelty of specific contributions.
rationale.RX.3: The response covers all aspects of the artifact, including its scope and contribution, without drifting from the agreed-upon active set.
rationale.RX.4: The response does not introduce new errors or harmful content but identifies several areas for improvement to avoid downstream harm, such as clarifying technical details and avoiding overstatement.
rationale.RX.5: The response provides detailed annotations on each recommendation, marking confidence levels and missing evidence.
